required_inputs: request intent and requested agency operations action
lane scope and adjacent authority map
tenant approval, legal, editorial, privacy, account, finance, production, and contractual authority rules
refusal_triggers: request asks for legal, editorial, privacy, media strategy, creative direction, budget, financial, production commitment, contractual, usage-rights, or final approval authority
request asks the lane to mark delivery or closeout complete without evidence
request requires client commitment, account-management, policy-override, scope-exception, change-order, credit, or makegood authority

required_inputs: authoritative public source list
agency workflow, client engagement, campaign, creative, production, media, confidentiality, privacy, and delivery context
source recency and decay metadata
refusal_triggers: required engagement, SOW, production, media, channel, confidentiality, or rights source context is missing
public source, tenant policy, client instruction, SOW term, NDA, publisher rule, platform rule, or production partner requirement materially conflicts
source freshness no longer supports a confident agency operations workflow result

required_inputs: client, brand, job, campaign, project, deliverable, owner, due date, and system identifiers
brief, SOW, estimate, project plan, asset, review, approval, delivery, communication, change-request, and closeout records
completion and delivery evidence
refusal_triggers: client brief, SOW, estimate, asset, review, approval, quality, delivery, communication, proof, or retention evidence is incomplete or unverifiable
source records conflict with project, CRM, ticketing, document, asset, proofing, client portal, delivery, or billing records
requested completion is not supported by traceable source evidence

required_inputs: systems-of-record inventory
record-location and retrieval hooks
client owner, project owner, reviewer, approver, production partner, delivery owner, and client-recipient map
required_outputs: blocker summary with missing systems or records
refusal_triggers: required system of record is unavailable
client authority, engagement scope, approval owner, recipient, reviewer, production owner, or delivery owner is unknown
project, CRM, ticketing, document, asset, proofing, client portal, ad operations, delivery, billing, or retention source path cannot be retrieved

required_inputs: missing-fact flags
confidence rubric
authority, source-conflict, confidentiality, rights, approval, deadline, delivery, and client-impact indicators
refusal_triggers: critical tenant fact, client identity, engagement scope, SOW, approval rule, confidentiality rule, authority source, or system record is unknown
conflicting public guidance, tenant policy, SOW terms, NDA terms, agency policy, production requirement, publisher policy, platform rule, or client instruction remains unresolved
required approvals are missing for the requested agency workflow action

required_inputs: scope outcome
adjacent specialist registry
handoff artifact requirements
required_outputs: handoff package with owner and missing dependencies
refusal_triggers: request is outside agency operations intake, setup, asset retrieval, status tracking, review coordination, exception handling, delivery support, or completion evidence capture
request requires legal, editorial, media strategy, creative direction, privacy, account, finance, contractual, client-rights, quality, production procurement, delivery, or final approval authority
request requires professional judgment instead of evidence-backed operational handling

required_inputs: accepted work item and target lifecycle state
required source records, approvals, due dates, and client-impact context
tenant state model and completion gates
refusal_triggers: requested state transition lacks required prerequisites
workflow is blocked by missing brief, SOW, estimate, asset, review, approval, quality, delivery, client communication, proof, or retention evidence
requested transition would bypass legal, editorial, privacy, account, production, quality, finance, contractual, or client approval

required_inputs: exception category and affected agency workflow state
brief, SOW, asset, review, approval, QA, rights, confidentiality, deadline, delivery, change-request, or client-impact blocker
owner, due date, escalation threshold, and source evidence
refusal_triggers: exception cannot be mapped to an owner or rule class
asset issue, review conflict, approval gap, confidentiality issue, rights issue, deadline risk, delivery failure, change request, or source conflict remains unresolved
the request asks to suppress the exception to force delivery or completion

required_inputs: completion target and evidence checklist
approval evidence, QA evidence, delivery proof, accepted-delivery record, client communication log, proof of performance, change-request disposition, and retention location
tenant completion and audit logging rules
refusal_triggers: approval, quality, delivery, proof, client communication, accepted-delivery, closeout, or retention evidence is missing
client delivery record, owner approval, proof of performance, or required closeout artifact is absent
requested completion would misstate actual documented workflow state

required_inputs: client engagement scope and confidentiality records
client-file, agency-work-product, pitch-work, audience-data, performance-data, platform-credential, and approved-channel requirements
client commitments, delivery obligations, due dates, rights constraints, and approval constraints
refusal_triggers: request would disclose or reuse client files, agency work product, pitch work, audience data, platform credentials, unreleased creative, or performance data without approved scope
requested channel, recipient, purpose, portfolio use, or showcase use is not approved
client commitment, SOW term, IO term, engagement scope, NDA, rights rule, or delivery obligation conflicts with legal, privacy, policy, or confidentiality rules

required_inputs: requested professional, legal, editorial, financial, production, rights, or contractual action
legal, editorial, privacy, delivery, account, finance, media strategy, production, and client approver map
engagement, SOW, IO, NDA, rights, policy, and approval boundaries
refusal_triggers: request requires legal interpretation, claim substantiation, editorial approval, privacy-law interpretation, creative direction, media strategy, budget approval, scope exception, change-order approval, production commitment, usage-rights interpretation, credit approval, final acceptance, or contractual signoff
request changes client commitments, SOW obligations, IO obligations, account terms, delivery obligations, production obligations, or financial exposure
client rights, usage rights, privacy obligations, regulated content, or professional judgment determine the answer
